test.create_query: CREATE TABLE rs_right_1k (k UInt64, a Int32, b Int64, c UInt8, d Float64, e UInt32, f Int16, g UInt64, h Int8) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY tuple()
CREATE TABLE rs_right_100k (k UInt64, a Int32, b Int64, c UInt8, d Float64, e UInt32, f Int16, g UInt64, h Int8) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY tuple()
CREATE TABLE rs_right_1m (k UInt64, a Int32, b Int64, c UInt8, d Float64, e UInt32, f Int16, g UInt64, h Int8) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY tuple()
CREATE TABLE rs_right_10m (k UInt64, a Int32, b Int64, c UInt8, d Float64, e UInt32, f Int16, g UInt64, h Int8) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY tuple()
CREATE TABLE rs_right_1k_x10 (k UInt64, a Int32, b Int64, c UInt8, d Float64, e UInt32, f Int16, g UInt64, h Int8) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY tuple()
CREATE TABLE rs_right_100k_x10 (k UInt64, a Int32, b Int64, c UInt8, d Float64, e UInt32, f Int16, g UInt64, h Int8) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY tuple()
CREATE TABLE rs_right_1m_x10 (k UInt64, a Int32, b Int64, c UInt8, d Float64, e UInt32, f Int16, g UInt64, h Int8) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY tuple()
CREATE TABLE rs_right_mixed_1m (k UInt64, a Int32, b Int64, c UInt8, d Float64, s String) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY tuple()

CREATE TABLE rs_right_wide_mixed_1m ( k UInt64, a Int32, b Int64, c UInt8, d Float64, e UInt32, f Int16, g UInt64, h Int8, i Int32, j Int64, m UInt32, n UInt16, s String ) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY tuple()
CREATE TABLE rs_probe_200m (k UInt64) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY tuple()
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO rs_probe_200m SELECT number FROM numbers(200000000) ORDER BY rand()

INSERT INTO rs_right_1k SELECT number, toInt32(number), toInt64(number * 2), toUInt8(number), toFloat64(number) + 0.25, toUInt32(number * 3), toInt16(number), toUInt64(number * 7), toInt8(number) FROM numbers(1000) ORDER BY rand()

INSERT INTO rs_right_100k SELECT number, toInt32(number), toInt64(number * 2), toUInt8(number), toFloat64(number) + 0.25, toUInt32(number * 3), toInt16(number), toUInt64(number * 7), toInt8(number) FROM numbers(100000) ORDER BY rand()

INSERT INTO rs_right_1m SELECT number, toInt32(number), toInt64(number * 2), toUInt8(number), toFloat64(number) + 0.25, toUInt32(number * 3), toInt16(number), toUInt64(number * 7), toInt8(number) FROM numbers(1000000) ORDER BY rand()

INSERT INTO rs_right_10m SELECT number, toInt32(number), toInt64(number * 2), toUInt8(number), toFloat64(number) + 0.25, toUInt32(number * 3), toInt16(number), toUInt64(number * 7), toInt8(number) FROM numbers(10000000) ORDER BY rand()

INSERT INTO rs_right_1k_x10 SELECT number % 1000, toInt32(number), toInt64(number * 2), toUInt8(number), toFloat64(number) + 0.25, toUInt32(number * 3), toInt16(number), toUInt64(number * 7), toInt8(number) FROM numbers(10000) ORDER BY rand()

INSERT INTO rs_right_100k_x10 SELECT number % 100000, toInt32(number), toInt64(number * 2), toUInt8(number), toFloat64(number) + 0.25, toUInt32(number * 3), toInt16(number), toUInt64(number * 7), toInt8(number) FROM numbers(1000000) ORDER BY rand()

INSERT INTO rs_right_1m_x10 SELECT number % 1000000, toInt32(number), toInt64(number * 2), toUInt8(number), toFloat64(number) + 0.25, toUInt32(number * 3), toInt16(number), toUInt64(number * 7), toInt8(number) FROM numbers(10000000) ORDER BY rand()
INSERT INTO rs_right_mixed_1m SELECT number, toInt32(number), toInt64(number * 2), toUInt8(number), toFloat64(number) + 0.25, concat('s', toString(number)) FROM numbers(1000000) ORDER BY rand()

INSERT INTO rs_right_wide_mixed_1m SELECT number, toInt32(number), toInt64(number * 2), toUInt8(number), toFloat64(number) + 0.25, toUInt32(number * 3), toInt16(number), toUInt64(number * 7), toInt8(number), toInt32(number * 5), toInt64(number * 11), toUInt32(number * 13), toUInt16(number), concat('s', toString(number)) FROM numbers(1000000) ORDER BY rand()
test.query: SELECT * FROM rs_probe_200m l INNER JOIN rs_right_1k r ON (l.k % 1000) = r.k FORMAT Null SETTINGS min_columns_for_hash_join_row_store = {row_store}, join_algorithm = 'hash'
SELECT * FROM rs_probe_200m l INNER JOIN rs_right_100k r ON (l.k % 100000) = r.k FORMAT Null SETTINGS min_columns_for_hash_join_row_store = {row_store}, join_algorithm = 'hash'
SELECT * FROM rs_probe_200m l INNER JOIN rs_right_1m r ON (l.k % 1000000) = r.k FORMAT Null SETTINGS min_columns_for_hash_join_row_store = {row_store}, join_algorithm = 'hash'
SELECT * FROM rs_probe_200m l INNER JOIN rs_right_10m r ON (l.k % 10000000) = r.k FORMAT Null SETTINGS min_columns_for_hash_join_row_store = {row_store}, join_algorithm = 'hash'

SELECT * FROM (SELECT k FROM rs_probe_200m LIMIT 20000000) l INNER JOIN rs_right_1k_x10 r ON (l.k % 1000) = r.k FORMAT Null SETTINGS min_columns_for_hash_join_row_store = {row_store}, join_algorithm = 'hash'

SELECT * FROM (SELECT k FROM rs_probe_200m LIMIT 20000000) l INNER JOIN rs_right_100k_x10 r ON (l.k % 100000) = r.k FORMAT Null SETTINGS min_columns_for_hash_join_row_store = {row_store}, join_algorithm = 'hash'

SELECT * FROM (SELECT k FROM rs_probe_200m LIMIT 20000000) l INNER JOIN rs_right_1m_x10 r ON (l.k % 1000000) = r.k FORMAT Null SETTINGS min_columns_for_hash_join_row_store = {row_store}, join_algorithm = 'hash'
SELECT * FROM rs_probe_200m l ANY INNER JOIN rs_right_10m r ON (l.k % 10000000) = r.k FORMAT Null SETTINGS min_columns_for_hash_join_row_store = {row_store}, join_algorithm = 'hash'
SELECT * FROM rs_probe_200m l ANY INNER JOIN rs_right_10m r ON (l.k % 10000000) = r.k FORMAT Null SETTINGS min_columns_for_hash_join_row_store = {row_store}, join_algorithm = 'parallel_hash'
SELECT * FROM rs_probe_200m l INNER JOIN rs_right_10m r ON (l.k % 10000000) = r.k FORMAT Null SETTINGS min_columns_for_hash_join_row_store = {row_store}, join_algorithm = 'parallel_hash'
SELECT * FROM rs_probe_200m l LEFT JOIN rs_right_1m r ON (l.k % 2000000) = r.k FORMAT Null SETTINGS min_columns_for_hash_join_row_store = {row_store}, join_algorithm = 'hash'
SELECT * FROM rs_probe_200m l INNER JOIN rs_right_mixed_1m r ON (l.k % 1000000) = r.k FORMAT Null SETTINGS min_columns_for_hash_join_row_store = {row_store}, join_algorithm = 'hash'
SELECT * FROM rs_probe_200m l INNER JOIN rs_right_wide_mixed_1m r ON (l.k % 1000000) = r.k FORMAT Null SETTINGS min_columns_for_hash_join_row_store = {row_store}, join_algorithm = 'hash'
